description.zh-cn: AI 导购客服：复用核心 6 大模型，结合可维护的知识库与热销商品上下文，回答商品咨询/导购/常见问题。前台自动注入对话挂件，记录会话便于复盘与训练知识库。需在「系统设置-AI」配置模型。
description.en: AI shopping assistant: reuses the core LLMs with an editable knowledge base and best-seller context to answer product/shopping/FAQ questions. Injects a chat widget on the storefront and logs conversations. Requires an AI model configured in System Settings - AI.
